title: Court challenge escalates over election contracts
summary: A federal court fight over Kalshi-linked contract offerings moved into a more adverse posture, creating material litigation pressure.
whyItMatters: This is the cleanest kind of signal for the site: named party, formal proceeding, and real operational downside if the company loses.

title: Critical feature paints Kalshi as reckless on compliance
summary: A high-visibility outlet framed Kalshi as aggressive and under-regulated, pushing the story beyond niche prediction-market coverage.
whyItMatters: Bad press only deserves feed placement once it clearly shapes public perception or raises regulator attention.

title: Regulator inquiry rumored after social chatter spike
summary: Several accounts claim a pending regulator inquiry, but there is no primary source yet and the sourcing chain is weak.
whyItMatters: This should stay out of the public feed until it resolves into a filing, official statement, or reputable report.

title: Motion denial hits a Kalshi litigation position
summary: A court order appears to reject one Kalshi argument, but the broader case remains unresolved.
whyItMatters: A site like this should distinguish between a clean loss and an unfavorable interim ruling.

title: Outrage cycle over ad copy burns through social channels
summary: Screenshots of campaign messaging are circulating widely, but the story has not escaped platform-native discourse.
whyItMatters: This is exactly the sort of item that needs editorial restraint or the feed becomes useless.
